texto: Generations of Humeans have… been misled into offering analyses of causation and of natural law that have been far too weak because they had no basis for accepting the existence of either cause and effect or natural laws… Hume’s scepticism about cause and effect and his agnosticism about the external world are of course jettisoned the moment he leaves his study.
explicacao: Citação de Antony Flew sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Generations of Humeans have… been misled into offering analyses of causation and of natural law t…” articula reflexao, god, hume em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e hume.
